name: unitares-governance
description: Governance client for UNITARES: onboarding, diagnostics, dialectic review, and knowledge graph guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Governance client for agent state, review, and shared memory.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to a running UNITARES governance server for onboarding, health diagnostics, dialectic review, and knowledge graph workflows.
defaultPrompt: Start or continue my UNITARES session in Codex.
Check me into UNITARES after this milestone.
Diagnose my current UNITARES continuity and governance state.
